data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user choice by limiting options and enhancing decision speed.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes navigation elements for easier access based on target size and distance.
data.technical_spec: Larger click targets for key actions on-page.

data.title: Consistency
data.description: Maintains consistent elements throughout to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Visual Hierarchy
data.description: Uses visual cues to guide the user's eye to areas of importance.
data.technical_spec: Contrast and whitespace prioritize key content areas.

data.title: Feedback
data.description: Provides immediate and clear responses to user actions.
data.technical_spec: Interactive components provide visual and textual feedback.
